title: Configure [project] section in pyproject.toml
goal: Set project name, version 1.00, description, and requires-python>=3.10.

title: Configure [build-system] with hatchling
goal: Set hatchling as build backend so uv can build the package.

title: Configure hatch wheel packages path
goal: Point hatch to src/airllm_benchmark so the package is discoverable.

title: Configure [dependency-groups] dev section
goal: Add ruff, pytest, and pytest-cov as dev-only dependencies.

title: Configure ruff line-length = 120
goal: Set maximum line length to 120 characters for ruff.

title: Configure ruff target-version = py310
goal: Target Python 3.10 syntax for ruff checks.

title: Configure ruff lint selectors E,F,W,I,N,UP,B,C4,SIM
goal: Enable the 9 rule families required by the course guidelines.

title: Configure pytest testpaths = ['tests']
goal: Tell pytest where to look for test files.

title: Configure pytest addopts with --cov flags
goal: Auto-run coverage on every pytest invocation.

title: Configure coverage.run source = ['src']
goal: Measure coverage only on production code in src/.

title: Configure coverage.report fail_under = 85
goal: Fail the build if coverage drops below 85%.

title: Configure coverage.report show_missing = true
goal: Show uncovered line numbers in the terminal report.

title: Add python-dotenv>=1.0.0 runtime dependency
goal: Load .env files automatically at startup.

title: Add requests>=2.31.0 runtime dependency
goal: HTTP client for Ollama REST API calls.

title: Add psutil>=5.9.0 runtime dependency
goal: Cross-platform RAM and process memory measurement.

title: Add transformers>=4.40.0 runtime dependency
goal: HuggingFace model loading for the HF baseline service.

title: Add torch>=2.2.0 runtime dependency
goal: Required by transformers for inference and VRAM measurement.

title: Add accelerate>=0.30.0 runtime dependency
goal: Required by transformers for multi-device model loading.

title: Add airllm>=0.6.0 runtime dependency
goal: Core library for layer-by-layer CPU inference.

title: Add matplotlib>=3.8.0 runtime dependency
goal: Generate benchmark comparison charts.

title: Add pandas>=2.2.0 runtime dependency
goal: DataFrame support for notebook result analysis.

title: Add jupyter>=1.0.0 runtime dependency
goal: Notebook server for results_analysis.ipynb.

title: Add ipykernel>=6.0.0 runtime dependency
goal: Python kernel for Jupyter notebooks.

title: Add ruff>=0.8.0 dev dependency
goal: Linter and formatter — must pass with 0 errors.

title: Add pytest>=7.4.0 dev dependency
goal: Test runner for all unit and integration tests.

title: Add pytest-cov>=4.1.0 dev dependency
goal: Coverage plugin for pytest.

title: Create .python-version file pinned to 3.11
goal: Tell uv which Python interpreter to use for the venv.

title: Create .gitignore env/secrets section
goal: Prevent .env, *.key, *.pem from being committed.

title: Create .gitignore Python artifacts section
goal: Exclude __pycache__, *.pyc, .venv from version control.

title: Create .gitignore model files section
goal: Exclude *.safetensors, *.gguf, *.bin — too large for git.

title: Create .gitignore results and assets section
goal: Exclude generated JSON results and chart PNGs from git.

title: Create .env.example with HF_TOKEN placeholder
goal: Document HuggingFace token variable with comment.

title: Create .env.example with MODEL_ID placeholder
goal: Document small model ID variable for HF baseline.

title: Create .env.example with AIRLLM_MODEL_ID placeholder
goal: Document large model ID variable for AirLLM service.

title: Create .env.example with OLLAMA_MODEL placeholder
goal: Document Ollama model name variable.

title: Create .env.example with MAX_NEW_TOKENS placeholder
goal: Document token generation limit with default of 20.

title: Create .env.example with DEVICE placeholder
goal: Document cpu/cuda device selection variable.

title: Create .env.example with MODELS_DIR placeholder
goal: Document local model cache directory path.

title: Create .env.example with RESULTS_DIR placeholder
goal: Document benchmark results output directory path.

title: Create src/ package directory structure
goal: Initialize all Python package directories under src/.

title: Create tests/ directory structure with __init__.py files
goal: Create unit/ and integration/ subdirectories with init files.

title: Create config/ directory with JSON files
goal: Store non-secret app config separate from code.

title: Create results/ directory with .gitkeep
goal: Track empty results dir in git so fresh clones work.

title: Create models/ directory with .gitkeep
goal: Track empty models dir in git so fresh clones work.

title: Create assets/ directory with .gitkeep
goal: Track empty assets dir for chart output files.

title: Create notebooks/ directory with .gitkeep
goal: Track empty notebooks dir in git.

title: Create GitHub Actions CI workflow file
goal: Define automated lint and test pipeline for every push.

title: Configure GitHub Actions ruff lint step
goal: Run ruff check src/ and fail PR if errors found.

title: Configure GitHub Actions pytest step
goal: Run full test suite with coverage on every PR.

title: Create Makefile with lint, test, and run targets
goal: Provide short-hand commands for common developer tasks.

title: Create src/airllm_benchmark/__init__.py
goal: Export __version__ from the top-level package.

title: Export __version__ string in package __init__
goal: Set __version__ = VERSION so importers can check the version.

title: Create shared/__init__.py
goal: Mark shared as a Python package.

title: Create version.py with VERSION = '1.00'
goal: Single source of truth for the project version string.

title: Define DEFAULT_MAX_NEW_TOKENS = 20 in constants
goal: Default token generation limit — small for fast verification.

title: Define DEFAULT_DEVICE = 'cpu' in constants
goal: Fall back to CPU when no GPU is detected.

title: Define DEFAULT_MODELS_DIR = './models' in constants
goal: Default local cache directory for downloaded model weights.

title: Define DEFAULT_RESULTS_DIR = './results' in constants
goal: Default output directory for benchmark result JSON files.

title: Define OLLAMA_BASE_URL in constants
goal: Base URL for the local Ollama server (http://localhost:11434).

title: Define OLLAMA_GENERATE_EP endpoint constant
goal: Path to the Ollama generate API endpoint (/api/generate).

title: Define OLLAMA_HEALTH_EP endpoint constant
goal: Path to the Ollama health-check endpoint (/api/tags).

title: Define VALID_METHODS tuple in constants
goal: Enumerate the four valid benchmark method names.

title: Define _CONFIG_PATH constant in config.py
goal: Resolve the absolute path to config/setup.json at import time.

title: Implement _load_json_config() helper
goal: Read and parse setup.json; return empty dict if file absent.

title: Implement load_config() merging json + env
goal: Return merged config where env vars override setup.json values.

title: Implement require_hf_token() with clear error
goal: Return HF_TOKEN or raise ValueError with actionable message.

title: Implement get_models_dir() returning Path
goal: Convert models_dir string from config to a Path object.

title: Implement get_results_dir() returning Path
goal: Convert results_dir string from config to a Path object.

title: Create gatekeeper.py ApiGatekeeper class skeleton
goal: Define the class that centralises all external API calls.

title: Implement ApiGatekeeper.__init__(rate_limits_path)
goal: Load rate-limit config and initialise per-service call counters.

title: Implement ApiGatekeeper._load_rate_limits()
goal: Read rate_limits.json and parse into a dict keyed by service name.

title: Implement ApiGatekeeper.call(service, fn, *args)
goal: Execute fn through the rate-limit queue with retry logic.

title: Implement ApiGatekeeper._retry(fn, max_retries, delay)
goal: Retry fn up to max_retries times with exponential back-off.

title: Implement ApiGatekeeper._log_call(service, success)
goal: Record each API call with timestamp and success flag.

title: Implement ApiGatekeeper._check_rate_limit(service)
goal: Raise if the per-minute call count would exceed the limit.

title: Test VERSION == '1.00'
goal: Verify the version string has the correct value.

title: Test __version__ matches VERSION
goal: Verify package-level __version__ is the same as VERSION.

title: Test DEFAULT_MAX_NEW_TOKENS == 20
goal: Verify the default token limit constant is 20.

title: Test DEFAULT_DEVICE == 'cpu'
goal: Verify the default device constant is 'cpu'.

title: Test OLLAMA_BASE_URL contains port 11434
goal: Verify the Ollama URL includes the standard port.

title: Test VALID_METHODS contains all four method names
goal: Verify ollama, hf_baseline, airllm, all are all present.

title: Test load_config() returns defaults without .env
goal: Verify fallback values when no env vars or setup.json set.

title: Test load_config() reads values from setup.json
goal: Verify JSON config values appear in the returned dict.

title: Test env vars override setup.json in load_config()
goal: Verify environment variables take precedence over file config.

title: Test require_hf_token() returns token when set
goal: Verify the function returns the token string on success.

title: Test require_hf_token() raises ValueError when empty
goal: Verify a clear error is raised when HF_TOKEN is empty string.

title: Test require_hf_token() raises ValueError when key absent
goal: Verify a clear error is raised when hf_token key is missing.

title: Test get_models_dir() returns Path object
goal: Verify the return type is pathlib.Path.

title: Test get_results_dir() returns Path object
goal: Verify the return type is pathlib.Path.

title: Test ApiGatekeeper loads rate limits from JSON
goal: Verify _load_rate_limits() parses rate_limits.json correctly.

title: Create models/__init__.py
goal: Mark models as a Python package and re-export key types.

title: Create benchmark_result.py BenchmarkResult dataclass
goal: Define the dataclass that holds one run's complete output.

title: Add BenchmarkResult.method field (str)
goal: Store which inference method produced this result.

title: Add BenchmarkResult.model_id field (str)
goal: Store the HuggingFace model ID or Ollama model name.

title: Add BenchmarkResult.prompt field (str)
goal: Store the exact prompt that was sent to the model.

title: Add BenchmarkResult.output field (str, default '')
goal: Store the model's generated text response.

title: Add BenchmarkResult.latency_s field (float)
goal: Store wall-clock time in seconds for the full inference run.

title: Add BenchmarkResult.ram_peak_mb field (float)
goal: Store peak RSS RAM in megabytes measured during inference.

title: Add BenchmarkResult.vram_peak_mb field (float, default 0.0)
goal: Store peak GPU VRAM in MB; zero if no GPU was used.

title: Add BenchmarkResult.tokens_generated field (int)
goal: Store number of new tokens produced by the model.

title: Add BenchmarkResult.tokens_per_second field (float)
goal: Store throughput: tokens_generated / latency_s.

title: Add BenchmarkResult.disk_gb field (float, default 0.0)
goal: Store disk space consumed by model weights in gigabytes.

title: Add BenchmarkResult.cost_estimate field (str, default '')
goal: Store electricity cost estimate string (addresses RISK-01).

title: Add BenchmarkResult.error field (str, default '')
goal: Store error message if inference failed; empty on success.

title: Add BenchmarkResult.timestamp field (str, ISO 8601)
goal: Store UTC time when the benchmark run completed.

title: Implement BenchmarkResult.to_dict() method
goal: Serialize all fields to a JSON-compatible dict.

title: Implement BenchmarkResult.from_dict() classmethod
goal: Reconstruct a BenchmarkResult from a previously serialized dict.

title: Implement BenchmarkResult.is_success property
goal: Return True when error field is empty string.

title: Create comparison_report.py ComparisonReport dataclass
goal: Aggregate multiple BenchmarkResult objects for comparison.

title: Add ComparisonReport.results field (list[BenchmarkResult])
goal: Hold the list of results from all methods benchmarked.

title: Implement ComparisonReport.fastest_method property
goal: Return the method name with the lowest latency_s.

title: Implement ComparisonReport.most_memory_efficient property
goal: Return the method name with the lowest ram_peak_mb.

title: Implement ComparisonReport.summary_table() method
goal: Return a markdown table with one row per method.

title: Implement ComparisonReport.cost_breakdown() method
goal: Return dict mapping method name to cost_estimate string.

title: Implement ComparisonReport.recommendations() method
goal: Return list of recommendation strings based on results.

title: Implement ComparisonReport.to_markdown() method
goal: Return full markdown report with table and recommendations.

title: Implement ComparisonReport.to_dict() method
goal: Serialize the report to a JSON-compatible dict.

title: Test BenchmarkResult creation with all required fields
goal: Verify dataclass can be instantiated with all fields set.

title: Test BenchmarkResult.to_dict() contains all field keys
goal: Verify every dataclass field appears as a dict key.

title: Test BenchmarkResult.from_dict() round-trip fidelity
goal: Verify from_dict(to_dict(r)) == r.

title: Test BenchmarkResult.is_success True when error is empty
goal: Verify is_success returns True when error == ''.

title: Test BenchmarkResult.is_success False when error is set
goal: Verify is_success returns False when error has content.

title: Test BenchmarkResult.timestamp is ISO 8601 string
goal: Verify timestamp can be parsed by datetime.fromisoformat().

title: Test BenchmarkResult default values are correct
goal: Verify output='', vram_peak_mb=0.0, error='' by default.

title: Test BenchmarkResult tokens_per_second non-negative
goal: Verify tokens_per_second >= 0 when latency_s > 0.

title: Test ComparisonReport.fastest_method returns correct name
goal: Verify the method with min latency is returned.

title: Test ComparisonReport.most_memory_efficient returns correct name
goal: Verify the method with min ram_peak_mb is returned.

title: Test ComparisonReport.summary_table() contains all methods
goal: Verify all three method names appear in the table.

title: Test ComparisonReport.cost_breakdown() has one key per method
goal: Verify the dict has exactly one entry per result.

title: Test ComparisonReport.recommendations() is non-empty list
goal: Verify at least one recommendation is generated.

title: Test ComparisonReport.to_markdown() contains markdown table
goal: Verify output contains '|' characters (table format).

title: Test ComparisonReport.to_dict() is JSON-serializable
goal: Verify json.dumps(report.to_dict()) does not raise.

title: Test ComparisonReport with single result entry
goal: Verify report works correctly with only one result.

title: Test BenchmarkResult with error field populated
goal: Verify error field is stored and returned correctly.

title: Test ComparisonReport fastest_method excludes failed runs
goal: Verify failed results (error set) are excluded from ranking.

title: Create ollama_service.py OllamaService class
goal: Define service class that wraps all Ollama HTTP interactions.

title: Implement OllamaService.__init__(base_url, gatekeeper)
goal: Store base_url and gatekeeper reference; set timeout defaults.

title: Implement OllamaService.health_check() -> bool
goal: GET /api/tags and return True if Ollama responds with 200.

title: Implement OllamaService._build_generate_payload()
goal: Construct the JSON body for POST /api/generate with stream=False.

title: Implement OllamaService.generate(prompt, model, max_tokens)
goal: POST to Ollama generate endpoint and return raw response text.

title: Implement OllamaService._parse_response(response)
goal: Extract the 'response' field from Ollama JSON output.

title: Implement OllamaService._count_tokens(text) -> int
goal: Approximate token count by splitting on whitespace.

title: Implement OllamaService._calculate_latency(start, end) -> float
goal: Return wall-clock seconds between two time.perf_counter() calls.

title: Implement OllamaService.run_benchmark(prompt, config) -> BenchmarkResult
goal: Orchestrate a full timed run and return a BenchmarkResult.

title: Implement OllamaService._build_result(...) -> BenchmarkResult
goal: Populate all BenchmarkResult fields from collected metrics.

title: Handle OllamaService ConnectionError gracefully
goal: Catch requests.ConnectionError and return error BenchmarkResult.

title: Handle OllamaService request Timeout gracefully
goal: Catch requests.Timeout and return error BenchmarkResult.

title: Handle OllamaService non-200 HTTP response
goal: Check response.status_code and set error field when not 200.

title: Handle OllamaService malformed JSON response
goal: Catch json.JSONDecodeError and return descriptive error result.

title: Handle OllamaService missing 'response' key in JSON
goal: Return error result when Ollama JSON lacks expected 'response' key.

title: Add ollama_model default to config/setup.json
goal: Set 'tinyllama' as the default Ollama model for verification.

title: Add ollama rate-limit section to config/rate_limits.json
goal: Configure 60 rpm, 3 retries, 1s delay for Ollama calls.

title: Test OllamaService health_check success (mock 200)
goal: Mock requests.get to return 200 and verify health_check returns True.

title: Test OllamaService health_check failure returns False
goal: Mock requests.get to raise ConnectionError; verify False returned.

title: Test OllamaService _build_generate_payload structure
goal: Verify payload dict has 'model', 'prompt', 'stream' keys.

title: Test OllamaService _build_generate_payload stream=False
goal: Verify 'stream' key is always set to False.

title: Test OllamaService generate returns output string on success
goal: Mock 200 response with JSON body; verify output text is returned.

title: Test OllamaService generate ConnectionError -> error result
goal: Mock ConnectionError; verify returned BenchmarkResult has error set.

title: Test OllamaService generate Timeout -> error result
goal: Mock Timeout exception; verify BenchmarkResult error is non-empty.

title: Test OllamaService generate non-200 -> error result
goal: Mock 500 response; verify BenchmarkResult error field is set.

title: Test OllamaService generate malformed JSON -> error result
goal: Mock response with invalid JSON; verify error result returned.

title: Test OllamaService _parse_response extracts text correctly
goal: Verify 'response' key value is returned from JSON dict.

title: Test OllamaService _parse_response missing key returns empty
goal: Verify empty string returned when 'response' key absent.

title: Test OllamaService _count_tokens returns positive int
goal: Verify token count is > 0 for a non-empty string.

title: Test OllamaService run_benchmark returns BenchmarkResult
goal: Verify return type is BenchmarkResult dataclass instance.

title: Test OllamaService run_benchmark result.method == 'ollama'
goal: Verify the method field is set to 'ollama'.

title: Test OllamaService run_benchmark result.latency_s > 0
goal: Verify latency was measured and is positive.

title: Test OllamaService run_benchmark result.ram_peak_mb >= 0
goal: Verify RAM measurement is captured and non-negative.

title: Test OllamaService run_benchmark error sets result.error
goal: Verify failure path populates the error field.

title: Test OllamaService result.model_id matches config value
goal: Verify model_id in result equals ollama_model from config.

title: Test OllamaService result.cost_estimate is non-empty string
goal: Verify cost estimate is calculated and stored.

title: Test OllamaService result.timestamp is ISO 8601 format
goal: Verify timestamp can be parsed by datetime.fromisoformat().

title: Test OllamaService uses OLLAMA_BASE_URL constant
goal: Verify the base URL comes from constants, not a hardcoded string.

title: Test OllamaService uses OLLAMA_GENERATE_EP constant
goal: Verify generate endpoint path comes from constants module.

title: Test OllamaService gatekeeper.call() is used not raw requests
goal: Verify HTTP calls go through the gatekeeper, not requests directly.

title: Test OllamaService payload contains max_tokens from config
goal: Verify num_predict in payload matches config max_new_tokens.

title: Integration test: Ollama health_check returns True
goal: Requires Ollama running locally; verify server is reachable.

title: Integration test: Ollama generate tinyllama produces output
goal: Run a real inference call and verify non-empty output string.

title: Integration test: Ollama latency_s > 0 seconds
goal: Verify wall-clock latency is measured and positive.

title: Integration test: Ollama result tokens_generated > 0
goal: Verify at least one token was generated in the real run.

title: Integration test: Ollama result is_success == True
goal: Verify no error occurred in a real Ollama benchmark run.

title: Integration test: Ollama result ram_peak_mb > 0
goal: Verify RAM measurement was captured during real inference.

title: Integration test: Ollama benchmark saves result JSON
goal: Verify result JSON file is written to results/ directory.

title: Integration test: Ollama result JSON is valid and loadable
goal: Verify saved JSON file can be parsed back to BenchmarkResult.

title: Test OllamaService _build_result populates all fields
goal: Verify every BenchmarkResult field is set by _build_result.

title: Test OllamaService measures RAM using psutil
goal: Verify psutil.Process().memory_info() is called during benchmark.

title: Create hf_service.py HFBaselineService class
goal: Define service class that runs standard HuggingFace model inference.

title: Implement HFBaselineService.__init__(model_id, device, token)
goal: Store model_id, target device, and HF auth token; init to None model.

title: Implement HFBaselineService._load_tokenizer()
goal: Load AutoTokenizer from HuggingFace Hub using model_id and token.

title: Implement HFBaselineService._load_model()
goal: Load AutoModelForCausalLM and move to target device.

title: Implement HFBaselineService._check_memory_before_load()
goal: Estimate model size from config and warn if it exceeds available RAM.

title: Implement HFBaselineService._tokenize_prompt(prompt) -> tensor
goal: Encode prompt string to input_ids tensor on target device.

title: Implement HFBaselineService._run_inference(input_ids) -> tensor
goal: Call model.generate() with max_new_tokens and return output tensor.

title: Implement HFBaselineService._decode_output(output_ids) -> str
goal: Decode output tensor to string, skipping special tokens.

title: Implement HFBaselineService.generate(prompt) -> str
goal: Orchestrate tokenize -> inference -> decode and return text.

title: Implement HFBaselineService.unload_model()
goal: Delete model from memory and call torch.cuda.empty_cache().

title: Implement HFBaselineService.run_benchmark(prompt, config) -> BenchmarkResult
goal: Full timed benchmark run including memory measurement.

title: Handle HFBaselineService OutOfMemoryError (CUDA OOM)
goal: Catch torch.cuda.OutOfMemoryError and return descriptive error result.

title: Handle HFBaselineService RAM OOM (CPU inference)
goal: Catch MemoryError during CPU inference and return error result.

title: Handle HFBaselineService missing HF_TOKEN error
goal: Raise ValueError before loading if token is missing.

title: Handle HFBaselineService invalid model_id (404 from Hub)
goal: Catch OSError from HF Hub and return error BenchmarkResult.

title: Select GPU device when CUDA is available
goal: Use torch.cuda.is_available() to auto-select cuda vs cpu device.

title: Add hf model config to config/setup.json
goal: Set TinyLlama/TinyLlama-1.1B-Chat-v1.0 as default small model.

title: Add huggingface rate-limit section to rate_limits.json
goal: Configure 10 rpm, 3 retries, 5s delay for HF Hub API calls.

title: Test HFBaselineService.__init__ sets attributes correctly
goal: Verify model_id, device, token stored; model/tokenizer start as None.

title: Test HFBaselineService._load_tokenizer calls AutoTokenizer (mock)
goal: Mock AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained; verify it is called with model_id.

title: Test HFBaselineService._load_model calls AutoModelForCausalLM (mock)
goal: Mock AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained; verify called with model_id.

title: Test HFBaselineService._load_model OOM raises (mock)
goal: Mock from_pretrained to raise MemoryError; verify propagated.

title: Test HFBaselineService._check_memory_before_load runs
goal: Verify memory check is called before model load in run_benchmark.

title: Test HFBaselineService.generate success path (mock model)
goal: Mock tokenizer+model; verify non-empty string returned.

title: Test HFBaselineService.generate CUDA OOM returns error result
goal: Mock generate to raise OutOfMemoryError; verify error BenchmarkResult.

title: Test HFBaselineService.generate CPU MemoryError returns error result
goal: Mock generate to raise MemoryError; verify error BenchmarkResult.

title: Test HFBaselineService.generate missing HF_TOKEN raises ValueError
goal: Verify ValueError raised when token is empty string.

title: Test HFBaselineService._tokenize_prompt returns tensor
goal: Mock tokenizer; verify _tokenize_prompt returns input_ids tensor.

title: Test HFBaselineService._decode_output returns string
goal: Mock tokenizer.decode; verify string is returned.

title: Test HFBaselineService.run_benchmark returns BenchmarkResult
goal: Mock model+tokenizer; verify return type is BenchmarkResult.

title: Test HFBaselineService run_benchmark result.method == 'hf_baseline'
goal: Verify the method field is set to 'hf_baseline'.

title: Test HFBaselineService OOM result has error field set
goal: Verify error field is non-empty when OOM occurs.

title: Test HFBaselineService invalid model_id returns error result
goal: Mock OSError from Hub; verify error BenchmarkResult returned.

title: Test HFBaselineService GPU device selection when CUDA available (mock)
goal: Mock torch.cuda.is_available to True; verify device becomes 'cuda'.

title: Test HFBaselineService CPU fallback when no CUDA (mock)
goal: Mock torch.cuda.is_available to False; verify device is 'cpu'.

title: Test HFBaselineService.unload_model clears model reference
goal: Verify self.model is None after unload_model() call.

title: Test HFBaselineService result.model_id matches config
goal: Verify model_id in result equals MODEL_ID from config.

title: Test HFBaselineService result.latency_s > 0
goal: Verify latency is measured and positive in mock run.

title: Test HFBaselineService result.ram_peak_mb >= 0
goal: Verify RAM peak measurement is non-negative.

title: Test HFBaselineService result.tokens_generated > 0 on success
goal: Verify token count is positive when inference succeeds.

title: Test HFBaselineService result.cost_estimate populated
goal: Verify cost_estimate is non-empty string after benchmark.

title: Test HFBaselineService result.timestamp is ISO 8601
goal: Verify timestamp can be parsed by datetime.fromisoformat().

title: Integration test: HF baseline small model loads and infers
goal: Run TinyLlama inference; verify non-empty output and latency > 0.

title: Integration test: HF baseline large model OOM demonstration
goal: Attempt to load 7B model on CPU; verify OOM is caught and reported.

title: Integration test: HF baseline result is saved to results/
goal: Verify JSON file is written to results/ directory after run.

title: Test HFBaselineService uses gatekeeper for HF Hub calls
goal: Verify Hub download goes through gatekeeper, not direct import.

title: Test HFBaselineService _check_memory logs warning when low RAM
goal: Mock psutil.virtual_memory to return low available RAM; check warning.

title: Test HFBaselineService result.vram_peak_mb set when GPU used
goal: Mock cuda memory measurement; verify vram_peak_mb > 0.

title: Test HFBaselineService result.disk_gb reflects model size
goal: Verify disk_gb is populated from model files on disk.

title: Test HFBaselineService model is unloaded after benchmark
goal: Verify unload_model() is called after run_benchmark completes.

title: Create airllm_service.py AirLLMService class
goal: Define service class for layer-by-layer CPU inference via AirLLM.

title: Implement AirLLMService.__init__(model_id, models_dir)
goal: Store model ID and local cache dir; set model and tokenizer to None.

title: Implement AirLLMService._verify_safetensors(model_path)
goal: Check that at least one .safetensors file exists in the model dir.

title: Implement AirLLMService._check_disk_space(required_gb)
goal: Use shutil.disk_usage() to verify sufficient disk space exists.

title: Implement AirLLMService._download_model()
goal: Use huggingface_hub.snapshot_download to fetch safetensors weights.

title: Implement AirLLMService._load_airllm_model(model_path)
goal: Instantiate airllm.AutoModelForCausalLM with compression setting.

title: Implement AirLLMService._load_tokenizer()
goal: Load AutoTokenizer from HuggingFace Hub with the model_id.

title: Implement AirLLMService._tokenize_prompt(prompt) -> tensor
goal: Encode prompt to input_ids tensor; move to CPU explicitly.

title: Implement AirLLMService._run_layer_inference(input_ids)
goal: Call model.generate() layer-by-layer with max_new_tokens limit.

title: Implement AirLLMService._decode_output(output_ids) -> str
goal: Decode generated token IDs back to a human-readable string.

title: Implement AirLLMService.generate(prompt) -> str
goal: Orchestrate the full AirLLM inference pipeline end-to-end.

title: Implement AirLLMService.run_benchmark(prompt, config) -> BenchmarkResult
goal: Full timed AirLLM run with RAM and disk measurement.

title: Implement AirLLMService.cleanup()
goal: Delete model reference and clear any temp files from disk.

title: Handle AirLLMService SafeTensors file not found
goal: Return error BenchmarkResult when safetensors not present.

title: Handle AirLLMService insufficient disk space
goal: Return error BenchmarkResult when disk_usage shows too little free space.

title: Handle AirLLMService ImportError when airllm not installed
goal: Catch ImportError and return actionable error message in result.

title: Handle AirLLMService model download failure (network error)
goal: Catch HfHubHTTPError and return descriptive error BenchmarkResult.

title: Add airllm_model_id default to config/setup.json
goal: Set mistralai/Mistral-7B-v0.1 as default AirLLM model.

title: Add airllm rate-limit section to config/rate_limits.json
goal: Configure 5 rpm, 2 retries, 10s delay for AirLLM model downloads.

title: Test AirLLMService.__init__ sets attributes correctly
goal: Verify model_id and models_dir stored; model/tokenizer start as None.

title: Test AirLLMService._verify_safetensors success (mock dir with file)
goal: Create tmp dir with .safetensors file; verify True returned.

title: Test AirLLMService._verify_safetensors failure (no safetensors)
goal: Empty tmp dir; verify FileNotFoundError raised.

title: Test AirLLMService._check_disk_space sufficient (mock shutil)
goal: Mock disk_usage with large free space; verify no error raised.

title: Test AirLLMService._check_disk_space insufficient raises
goal: Mock disk_usage with tiny free space; verify OSError raised.

title: Test AirLLMService._download_model calls snapshot_download (mock)
goal: Mock huggingface_hub.snapshot_download; verify called with model_id.

title: Test AirLLMService._load_airllm_model calls airllm API (mock)
goal: Mock airllm.AutoModelForCausalLM; verify it is called with model path.

title: Test AirLLMService._load_tokenizer calls AutoTokenizer (mock)
goal: Mock AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained; verify called with model_id.

title: Test AirLLMService.generate success returns string (mock)
goal: Mock model and tokenizer; verify non-empty string returned.

title: Test AirLLMService.generate safetensors missing returns error
goal: Simulate missing safetensors; verify error BenchmarkResult returned.

title: Test AirLLMService.generate disk insufficient returns error
goal: Simulate low disk; verify error BenchmarkResult returned.

title: Test AirLLMService.generate ImportError returns error result
goal: Mock airllm import to fail; verify error BenchmarkResult returned.

title: Test AirLLMService.run_benchmark returns BenchmarkResult
goal: Mock full pipeline; verify BenchmarkResult dataclass returned.

title: Test AirLLMService run_benchmark result.method == 'airllm'
goal: Verify method field is 'airllm' in returned result.

title: Test AirLLMService run_benchmark result.latency_s > 0
goal: Verify latency is measured and positive.

title: Test AirLLMService run_benchmark result.ram_peak_mb >= 0
goal: Verify RAM measurement is non-negative.

title: Test AirLLMService run_benchmark error field when failure
goal: Verify error field set when any stage fails.

title: Test AirLLMService.cleanup clears model reference
goal: Verify self.model is None after cleanup() call.

title: Test AirLLMService result.disk_gb reflects model directory size
goal: Verify disk_gb is calculated from safetensors file sizes.

title: Test AirLLMService result.cost_estimate is populated
goal: Verify cost_estimate string is non-empty after benchmark.

title: Test AirLLMService result.tokens_generated > 0 on success
goal: Verify token count is positive when inference succeeds.

title: Test AirLLMService result.model_id matches config value
goal: Verify model_id field equals AIRLLM_MODEL_ID from config.

title: Test AirLLMService result.timestamp is ISO 8601
goal: Verify timestamp can be parsed by datetime.fromisoformat().

title: Integration test: AirLLM download and inference on 7B model
goal: Full real run — download Mistral-7B safetensors and run inference.

title: Integration test: AirLLM latency significantly higher than Ollama
goal: Compare AirLLM latency vs Ollama baseline to confirm tradeoff.

title: Integration test: AirLLM RAM usage stays below available RAM
goal: Verify AirLLM does not OOM even for 7B model on 32GB machine.

title: Integration test: AirLLM result is_success == True
goal: Verify no error field set in a successful real AirLLM run.

title: Integration test: AirLLM result saved to results/
goal: Verify JSON result file written after successful AirLLM benchmark.

title: Test AirLLMService uses gatekeeper for HF Hub download
goal: Verify Hub calls go through gatekeeper, not direct snapshot_download.

title: Test AirLLMService cleanup called after run_benchmark
goal: Verify cleanup() is called even when benchmark raises an exception.

title: Test AirLLMService result.vram_peak_mb is 0 on CPU-only run
goal: Verify VRAM stays 0 when AirLLM runs on CPU with no GPU.

title: Create metrics/__init__.py
goal: Mark metrics as a Python package and export MetricsCollector.

title: Create metrics_collector.py MetricsCollector class
goal: Context manager that measures RAM, VRAM, and latency around a block.

title: Implement MetricsCollector.__init__(process=None)
goal: Store psutil.Process reference; initialise peak tracking fields.

title: Implement MetricsCollector.__enter__() context entry
goal: Record start time and initial RAM; return self.

title: Implement MetricsCollector.__exit__() context exit
goal: Record end time and final RAM; compute latency_s.

title: Implement MetricsCollector._get_ram_mb() -> float
goal: Return current RSS memory in MB via psutil.Process().memory_info().

title: Implement MetricsCollector._get_vram_mb() -> float
goal: Return current VRAM allocated in MB; return 0.0 if no GPU.

title: Implement MetricsCollector._update_peak_ram()
goal: Sample RAM and update self._peak_ram if current reading is higher.

title: Implement MetricsCollector._update_peak_vram()
goal: Sample VRAM and update self._peak_vram if current reading is higher.

title: Implement MetricsCollector.latency_s property
goal: Return elapsed time in seconds between __enter__ and __exit__.

title: Implement MetricsCollector.ram_peak_mb property
goal: Return the maximum RAM observed during the measurement window.

title: Implement MetricsCollector.vram_peak_mb property
goal: Return the maximum VRAM observed; 0.0 when no GPU present.

title: Implement MetricsCollector.to_dict() method
goal: Return dict with latency_s, ram_peak_mb, vram_peak_mb keys.

title: Create cost_estimator.py CostEstimator class
goal: Estimate electricity cost from hardware TDP and run duration.

title: Implement CostEstimator.__init__(hardware_profile_path)
goal: Load hardware profile JSON with TDP values and electricity rate.

title: Implement CostEstimator.estimate_cpu_cost(latency_s) -> str
goal: Compute electricity cost from CPU TDP and runtime in seconds.

title: Implement CostEstimator.estimate_gpu_cost(latency_s) -> str
goal: Compute electricity cost from GPU TDP and runtime in seconds.

title: Implement CostEstimator.estimate_combined_cost(latency_s) -> str
goal: Sum CPU and GPU costs for a combined estimate string.

title: Implement CostEstimator._kwh_from_tdp(tdp_w, seconds) -> float
goal: Convert TDP watts and duration to kilowatt-hours consumed.

title: Implement CostEstimator.format_cost_string(usd) -> str
goal: Format a float cost as '$0.000123' style string.

title: Add cpu_tdp_w field to config/hardware_profiles.json
goal: Record i7-2700K TDP (95W) for CPU cost estimation.

title: Add gpu_tdp_w field to config/hardware_profiles.json
goal: Record RTX 3060 Ti TDP (200W) for GPU cost estimation.

title: Add electricity_cost_usd_per_kwh to hardware_profiles.json
goal: Set default electricity rate (0.12 USD/kWh) for cost calculations.

title: Test MetricsCollector context manager records start time
goal: Verify _start_time is set in __enter__.

title: Test MetricsCollector context manager records end time
goal: Verify _end_time is set in __exit__.

title: Test MetricsCollector.latency_s is positive after context exit
goal: Verify latency_s > 0 after a with-block completes.

title: Test MetricsCollector._get_ram_mb returns positive float
goal: Verify RAM reading is > 0 MB for any live process.

title: Test MetricsCollector._get_vram_mb returns 0.0 without GPU
goal: Mock torch.cuda.is_available to False; verify 0.0 returned.

title: Test MetricsCollector.ram_peak_mb is non-negative
goal: Verify peak RAM is >= 0 after context manager exits.

title: Test MetricsCollector.to_dict() has correct keys
goal: Verify dict contains latency_s, ram_peak_mb, vram_peak_mb.

title: Test MetricsCollector captures exception in context
goal: Verify latency is still recorded when exception raised inside with-block.

title: Test MetricsCollector works without explicit process arg
goal: Verify MetricsCollector() works using current process by default.

title: Test CostEstimator._kwh_from_tdp formula correctness
goal: Verify 95W for 3600s = 0.095 kWh (formula: tdp*s/3600000).

title: Test CostEstimator.estimate_cpu_cost returns formatted string
goal: Verify return value starts with '$' and contains digits.

title: Test CostEstimator.estimate_gpu_cost returns formatted string
goal: Verify GPU cost string is '$' prefixed and non-empty.

title: Test CostEstimator.estimate_combined_cost > cpu_cost alone
goal: Verify combined > CPU-only cost when GPU TDP is positive.

title: Test CostEstimator.format_cost_string formats to 6 decimals
goal: Verify output format is '$X.XXXXXX' for any input float.

title: Test CostEstimator loads hardware profile from JSON
goal: Verify TDP values are read from hardware_profiles.json.

title: Test CostEstimator estimate_cpu_cost with 0 latency returns $0
goal: Verify zero-second run produces $0 cost estimate.

title: Test MetricsCollector peak RAM updates over multiple samples
goal: Mock _get_ram_mb returning increasing values; verify peak is max.

title: Create sdk/__init__.py
goal: Mark sdk as a package and export BenchmarkSDK.

title: Create sdk.py BenchmarkSDK class skeleton
goal: Define the single public entry point for all benchmark operations.

title: Implement BenchmarkSDK.__init__(config=None)
goal: Load config via load_config() and create ApiGatekeeper instance.

title: Implement BenchmarkSDK._create_gatekeeper() factory
goal: Instantiate ApiGatekeeper with rate_limits.json path.

title: Implement BenchmarkSDK._create_ollama_service() factory
goal: Instantiate OllamaService with base_url and shared gatekeeper.

title: Implement BenchmarkSDK._create_hf_service() factory
goal: Instantiate HFBaselineService with model_id, device, and token.

title: Implement BenchmarkSDK._create_airllm_service() factory
goal: Instantiate AirLLMService with model_id and models_dir.

title: Implement BenchmarkSDK.run_ollama(prompt, max_tokens) -> BenchmarkResult
goal: Run Ollama benchmark and return result; no direct service calls from CLI.

title: Implement BenchmarkSDK.run_hf_baseline(prompt, max_tokens) -> BenchmarkResult
goal: Run HF baseline benchmark and return result via service layer.

title: Implement BenchmarkSDK.run_airllm(prompt, max_tokens) -> BenchmarkResult
goal: Run AirLLM benchmark and return result via service layer.

title: Implement BenchmarkSDK.run_all(prompt, max_tokens) -> list[BenchmarkResult]
goal: Run all three methods sequentially and return list of results.

title: Implement BenchmarkSDK.compare(results) -> ComparisonReport
goal: Build and return a ComparisonReport from a list of BenchmarkResults.

title: Implement BenchmarkSDK._validate_method(method)
goal: Raise ValueError for unknown method names before any work starts.

title: Implement BenchmarkSDK.save_result(result) -> Path
goal: Delegate to ResultsStorage.save() and return the written file path.

title: Implement BenchmarkSDK.load_results() -> list[BenchmarkResult]
goal: Load all saved results from results_dir via ResultsStorage.

title: Test BenchmarkSDK.__init__ creates gatekeeper
goal: Verify self.gatekeeper is not None after init.

title: Test BenchmarkSDK.__init__ loads config dict
goal: Verify self.config is a dict with expected keys.

title: Test BenchmarkSDK.run_hf_baseline calls HFBaselineService (mock)
goal: Mock HFBaselineService; verify run_benchmark called.

goal: Mock AirLLMService; verify run_benchmark called.

goal: Mock all three services; verify list length is 3.

goal: Mock one service to raise; verify other two results still returned.

goal: Verify compare() returns a ComparisonReport instance.

goal: Verify report.results has all passed BenchmarkResult objects.

goal: Verify no exception for ollama, hf_baseline, airllm, all.

goal: Verify ValueError raised for unknown method string.

title: Test BenchmarkSDK.save_result writes to disk (mock storage)
goal: Mock ResultsStorage.save; verify it is called with the result.

title: Test BenchmarkSDK.load_results delegates to storage (mock)
goal: Mock ResultsStorage.load_all; verify it is called and results returned.

title: Test BenchmarkSDK gatekeeper is shared across all services
goal: Verify the same gatekeeper instance is passed to all three services.

title: Test BenchmarkSDK.run_all result[0].method == 'ollama'
goal: Verify first result in list is the Ollama result.

title: Test BenchmarkSDK.run_all result[1].method == 'hf_baseline'
goal: Verify second result in list is the HF baseline result.

title: Test BenchmarkSDK.run_all result[2].method == 'airllm'
goal: Verify third result in list is the AirLLM result.

title: Test BenchmarkSDK.run_ollama result is BenchmarkResult type
goal: Verify return type annotation is correct and instance matches.

title: Test BenchmarkSDK services receive max_tokens from argument
goal: Verify max_tokens argument is forwarded to each service.

goal: Verify prompt argument is forwarded to each service unchanged.

goal: Verify save_result returns pathlib.Path to the written file.

title: Integration test: SDK run_all produces 3 valid BenchmarkResults
goal: Full end-to-end test with all three methods on real hardware.

title: Integration test: SDK compare() returns ComparisonReport
goal: Verify compare() on real results builds a valid report.

title: Integration test: SDK save and load results round-trip
goal: Save results to disk then load them back; verify equality.

title: Create storage/__init__.py
goal: Mark storage as a package and export ResultsStorage.

title: Create results_storage.py ResultsStorage class
goal: Persist and retrieve BenchmarkResult objects as JSON files.

title: Implement ResultsStorage.__init__(results_dir)
goal: Store results_dir Path; call _ensure_dir() on init.

title: Implement ResultsStorage._ensure_dir()
goal: Create results_dir if it does not exist (mkdir parents=True).

title: Implement ResultsStorage._filename_for_result(result) -> str
goal: Generate ISO-timestamp + method slug filename for a result JSON.

title: Implement ResultsStorage._serialize(result) -> str
goal: Convert BenchmarkResult to indented JSON string via to_dict().

title: Implement ResultsStorage._deserialize(json_str) -> BenchmarkResult
goal: Parse JSON string and reconstruct BenchmarkResult via from_dict().

title: Implement ResultsStorage.save(result) -> Path
goal: Write result JSON to disk and return the file path.

title: Implement ResultsStorage.load_all() -> list[BenchmarkResult]
goal: Read and deserialize all .json files in results_dir.

title: Implement ResultsStorage.load_by_method(method) -> list[BenchmarkResult]
goal: Filter load_all() results to only those matching the given method.

title: Implement ResultsStorage.load_latest() -> BenchmarkResult | None
goal: Return the most recently saved result or None if dir is empty.

goal: Store list of BenchmarkResult objects and build ComparisonReport.

title: Implement ReportGenerator.generate_recommendations() -> str

goal: Combine all sections into one markdown document.

goal: Write full report markdown to disk and return file path.

goal: Verify None is returned when no JSON files exist.

goal: Verify 'ollama' appears in the generated filename.

goal: Verify filename contains a date-like substring.

goal: Verify table string starts with '| Method |' header.

goal: Verify all three method names appear in cost section text.

title: Test ReportGenerator.generate_recommendations is non-empty
goal: Verify at least one recommendation bullet point is generated.

goal: Verify table, costs, and recommendations all appear in full report.

goal: Verify markdown file exists on disk after save_report().

goal: Create assets_dir if it does not already exist.

title: Implement ChartService._prepare_latency_data(results) -> dict
goal: Extract method names and latency_s values from results list.

goal: Extract method names, RAM, and VRAM values from results.

title: Implement ChartService._color_scheme class attribute

title: Implement ChartService.plot_trade_off_scatter(results) -> Path

goal: Call all four plot methods and return list of saved PNG paths.

title: Implement parse_args() function in main.py
goal: Build argparse parser with all supported arguments.

title: Add --method argument (choices: ollama/hf_baseline/airllm/all)
goal: Let the user select a single method or run all three.

title: Add --prompt argument with default sentence
goal: Accept the text prompt to send to the model(s).

title: Add --max-tokens argument (int, default 20)
goal: Limit generated tokens; keep small for fast verification.

title: Add --output-dir argument (optional path override)
goal: Override RESULTS_DIR env var from the command line.

title: Add --version argument via action='version'
goal: Print version string and exit without running benchmark.

title: Add --verbose flag (store_true)
goal: Enable detailed progress printing during benchmark run.

title: Add --hardware-profile argument (optional path)
goal: Override default hardware_profiles.json path for cost estimation.

goal: Ensure sys.exit() receives the correct code from main().

title: No missing type annotations on public functions (ruff ANN)
goal: All public function signatures have return type hints.

title: Create GitHub Actions workflow .github/workflows/ci.yml
goal: Define CI pipeline triggered on push and pull_request to master.

title: GitHub Actions: checkout and setup Python 3.11 step
goal: Use actions/setup-python with python-version 3.11.

title: GitHub Actions: install uv step
goal: Install uv via astral-sh/setup-uv action.

title: GitHub Actions: uv sync --system-certs step
goal: Install all dependencies including dev group.

title: GitHub Actions: ruff check src/ step
goal: Fail PR if ruff check finds any lint errors.

title: GitHub Actions: pytest with coverage step
goal: Run unit tests and fail if coverage drops below 85%.

title: GitHub Actions: upload coverage report artifact
goal: Upload coverage HTML report as a workflow artifact.

title: Create Makefile lint target (uv run ruff check src/)
goal: Shorthand 'make lint' runs the ruff check.

title: Create Makefile test target (uv run pytest tests/unit/)
goal: Shorthand 'make test' runs unit tests with coverage.

title: Create Makefile run-ollama target
goal: Shorthand 'make run-ollama' runs Ollama benchmark with defaults.

title: Create Makefile run-hf target
goal: Shorthand 'make run-hf' runs HF baseline benchmark with defaults.

title: Create Makefile run-airllm target
goal: Shorthand 'make run-airllm' runs AirLLM benchmark with defaults.

title: Create Makefile run-all target
goal: Shorthand 'make run-all' runs all three methods and saves results.

title: Create Makefile clean target
goal: Remove __pycache__, .pytest_cache, .coverage, and htmlcov/.

title: Verify uv sync completes without errors on fresh clone
goal: Run uv sync in a clean tmp dir and verify exit code 0.

title: Verify uv run python -c 'import airllm_benchmark' succeeds
goal: Verify package is importable after uv sync.

title: Verify no .pyc files committed to git
goal: Ensure __pycache__ and *.pyc are in .gitignore.

title: Verify models/ dir is in .gitignore
goal: Ensure large model weight files cannot be accidentally committed.

title: Verify results/*.json files are in .gitignore
goal: Ensure generated result files are not committed to git.

title: Add large model justification to MODEL_SELECTION.md
goal: Explain Mistral-7B: too big for VRAM FP16, requires AirLLM or quantization.

title: Add model license information to MODEL_SELECTION.md
goal: List Apache 2.0 (TinyLlama) and Mistral license for the large model.

title: Add SafeTensors requirement note to MODEL_SELECTION.md
goal: Explain why AirLLM requires SafeTensors format, not pickle .bin.

title: Add RTX 3060 Ti GPU spec to HARDWARE_PROFILES.md

title: Add expected benchmark results table to HARDWARE_PROFILES.md

goal: Add standard MIT License text with student name and year.

goal: Mark RISK-01 through RISK-05 prevention actions as in-progress.

goal: Search for TODO/PLACEHOLDER in all markdown files and resolve.

title: Create hardware_profiler.py HardwareProfiler class
goal: Auto-detect CPU, GPU, and RAM specs at runtime.

title: Implement HardwareProfiler.__init__(profile_path=None)
goal: Load hardware_profiles.json; fall back to auto-detection.

title: Implement HardwareProfiler.detect_cpu() -> dict
goal: Return cpu_count, cpu_freq_mhz using psutil.cpu_count/cpu_freq.

title: Implement HardwareProfiler.detect_ram() -> dict
goal: Return total_gb and available_gb via psutil.virtual_memory().

title: Implement HardwareProfiler.detect_gpu() -> dict | None
goal: Return gpu_name and vram_gb via torch.cuda; None if no GPU.

title: Implement HardwareProfiler.get_profile() -> dict
goal: Combine CPU, RAM, GPU dicts into a single hardware profile dict.

title: Implement HardwareProfiler.estimate_model_fit(model_gb, dtype) -> bool
goal: Return True if model fits in available VRAM or RAM given dtype.

title: Implement HardwareProfiler.recommend_quantization(model_gb) -> str
goal: Return 'fp16', 'q4', or 'q2' based on available VRAM.

title: Implement HardwareProfiler.to_markdown() -> str
goal: Format hardware profile as a markdown table for reports.

title: Add target hardware entry to config/hardware_profiles.json
goal: Document i7-2700K + 32GB DDR3 + RTX 3060 Ti as benchmark target.

title: Add cpu_cores field to hardware_profiles.json target
goal: Record 4 physical cores / 8 threads for the i7-2700K.

title: Add cpu_tdp_w field to hardware_profiles.json target
goal: Record 95W TDP for the i7-2700K Sandy Bridge-E.

title: Add ram_gb and ram_type fields to hardware_profiles.json
goal: Record 32 GB DDR3 and 25.6 GB/s bandwidth.

title: Add vram_gb field to hardware_profiles.json target
goal: Record 8 GB GDDR6 VRAM for the RTX 3060 Ti.

title: Add gpu_tdp_w field to hardware_profiles.json target
goal: Record 200W TDP for the RTX 3060 Ti.

title: Add gpu_cuda_cores field to hardware_profiles.json
goal: Record 4864 CUDA cores for the RTX 3060 Ti.

title: Test HardwareProfiler.detect_cpu returns dict with cores key
goal: Verify dict has 'cpu_count' key with positive int value.

title: Test HardwareProfiler.detect_ram returns dict with total_gb
goal: Verify total_gb > 0 (machine has some RAM).

title: Test HardwareProfiler.detect_gpu returns None when no GPU (mock)
goal: Mock torch.cuda.is_available to False; verify None returned.

title: Test HardwareProfiler.detect_gpu returns dict when GPU present (mock)
goal: Mock cuda available + get_device_properties; verify dict returned.

title: Test HardwareProfiler.get_profile returns dict with all sections
goal: Verify profile dict has cpu, ram, gpu keys.

title: Test HardwareProfiler.estimate_model_fit 7B FP16 on 8GB VRAM = False
goal: 7B * 2 bytes = 14GB > 8GB VRAM; verify False returned.

title: Test HardwareProfiler.estimate_model_fit 7B Q4 on 8GB VRAM = True
goal: 7B * 0.5 bytes = 3.5GB < 8GB VRAM; verify True returned.

title: Test HardwareProfiler.estimate_model_fit 7B on 32GB RAM = True
goal: With 32GB RAM, 7B FP16 (14GB) should fit; verify True.

title: Test HardwareProfiler.recommend_quantization fp16 for 3GB model
goal: Mock 8GB VRAM; 3GB model fits in fp16 — verify 'fp16' returned.

title: Test HardwareProfiler.recommend_quantization q4 for 10GB model
goal: Mock 8GB VRAM; 10GB fp16 but 5GB q4 still too big — verify 'q4'.

title: Test HardwareProfiler.recommend_quantization q2 for 14GB model
goal: Mock 8GB VRAM; only q2 (3.5GB) fits — verify 'q2' returned.

title: Test HardwareProfiler.to_markdown contains CPU row
goal: Verify 'CPU' appears in the markdown table output.

title: Test HardwareProfiler.to_markdown contains RAM row
goal: Verify 'RAM' appears in the markdown table output.

title: Test HardwareProfiler loads profile JSON when path provided
goal: Verify profile dict values come from hardware_profiles.json.
